adminExports.title: Admin Bulk Exports
adminExports.subtitle: Generate machine-readable JSON dumps and human-readable PDF/XLSX archives for the data the university needs to hand off. Each export builds in the background — you can watch progress live and the file downloads automatically once it is ready.

jobsOpen.label: Open Jobs
jobsOpen.description: Currently published jobs whose application deadline has not passed. Includes all submitted applications, ratings and interview data; draft applications are excluded.

jobsExpired.label: Expired Deadline Jobs
jobsExpired.description: Published jobs whose application deadline has passed but which have not yet been formally closed. Includes every application regardless of state.

jobsClosed.label: Closed Jobs
jobsClosed.description: Closed jobs and jobs where an applicant has been selected. Includes every application regardless of state.

jobsDraft.label: Draft Jobs
jobsDraft.description: Jobs currently in draft state. A job that was previously published may have been moved back to draft — any submitted applications still attached to it are included so the research group sees them.

full.label: Full Admin Export
full.description: Everything: research groups with their members and every job (drafts included), every application with documents, plus re-importable JSON dumps. Use this for handover to the university or backup.

usersAndOrgs.label: Users & Organisation
usersAndOrgs.description: JSON-only snapshot of schools, departments, research groups, users and the user ↔ research-group role assignments. Intended for re-seeding the database after a hard reset — contains no jobs, applications, documents or PDFs.

queued.detail: The export is being built in the background. The file will download automatically when it is ready.

downloaded.detail: The file has been downloaded. Check manifest.json inside the ZIP to verify completeness.

startError.detail: Something went wrong while queueing the export. Please try again.

alreadyRunning.detail: Only one admin export can run at a time. Wait for the current build to finish before starting another.

pollError.detail: Could not reach the server while polling for status. The export may still be running — refresh the page to reconnect.

buildFailed.detail: The export build failed on the server. Check the server logs for details.

downloadError.detail: The export was built but could not be downloaded. Please try again.
